title: Followup contradiction calibration
problem: Live mini-run suite passes 3/4 fixtures. creativity_ai_diversity_followup_short.txt fails contradiction stage only (0/1) because hybrid overlay treats an opposing-only extracted claim as qualifying, causing same_claim_pair validation rejection.
acceptance_criteria: creativity_ai_diversity_followup_short.txt contradiction stage reaches accepted_count >= 1 in default hybrid mode.
Live mini-run suite passes floors on 4/4 fixtures when Ollama is available, or report documents honest residual flakiness after minimal calibration.
Existing three passing suite fixtures remain passing.
No default DB writes; scratch DB remains operator-only.
Golden/mock gates and safety audit pass.
test_plan: python -m rge.cli probe-mini-run-suite (live, when Ollama available)
non_goals: Do not weaken contradiction validators or lower floors.
Do not skip the followup fixture.
Do not add OpenAI or cloud fallback.
Do not write to scratch or accepted graph DB during suite runs.
rollback_plan: Revert handoff and prompt changes; suite returns to 3/4 on followup contradiction.
